work.title: Software Engineering Intern
highlights: Built frontend modules for an in-house Patient Management System (PMS) using Vue.js and TypeScript, streamlining scheduling and patient record workflows.
Integrated AI features into the PMS including automated appointment summarization and clinical note suggestions, reducing manual documentation time for dental staff.
Managed backend services using Supabase (PostgreSQL) for real-time patient data sync, authentication, and role-based access control across clinic staff roles.
Automated patient appointment reminders using cron jobs integrated with Twilio, reducing no-shows and manual outreach effort.

work.title: Supply Chain Consultant
work.title_note: Internal title; role was Application Management Services (AMS) support — L2/L3 operations on Oracle Transportation Management (OTM). NOT implementation consulting.
highlights: Led optimization of transportation monitoring workflows by designing and deploying real-time SQL-based error detection queries, reducing application errors and functional disruptions by ~30% (estimated, not formally measured).
Acted as the primary liaison between 3 global supply chain clients and technical teams, aligning OTM customizations with business goals and ensuring SLA adherence.

Mentored and trained 10+ new hires through structured knowledge transfer sessions on incident handling, testing protocols, and client interaction, decreasing onboarding time by ~20% (estimated, not formally measured).
Leveraged advanced SQL queries on OTM's underlying database to extract actionable insights on shipment delays, carrier performance, and inactive user accounts.
Categorized incoming service requests by issue types (Order Management, Shipment Management, Rate Management, Business Process Automation) for faster resolution.
Delivered end-to-end client support, resolving 98% of P3 and P4 tickets within SLA.

work.title: Associate Consultant
work.title_note: Entry-level AMS support — application testing, ticket triage, error log analysis.
highlights: Performed 50+ application validation tests post-upgrades and maintenance, ensuring stable deployments and minimizing production issues across transportation workflows.
Triaged ServiceNow and JIRA tickets, monitored shared mailboxes, and analyzed OTM error logs to identify bottlenecks and escalate critical issues.
Supported APAC hypercare coverage for an automotive inbound logistics client, providing on-call escalation support across time zones.

projects.name: MedAssist.AI
projects.summary: Rare disease identifier and collaborative research prototype using AI and vector search. Clinical decision-support framing.
highlights: Built a clinical decision-support prototype that identifies rare diseases using vector similarity search over medical literature, powered by Vertex AI and ChromaDB.
Designed a RAG pipeline using FastAPI and Snowflake to retrieve and rank relevant medical knowledge chunks in real time.

projects.name: AI-Powered SEO Optimization Platform for YouTube Creators
highlights: Built a web-based tool that analyzes video metadata (title, description, tags) and provides optimization suggestions using Prompt Engineering and RAG.
Engineered a custom knowledge retrieval pipeline using vector-based similarity search and chunked document indexing to deliver high-relevance SEO recommendations.

projects.name: Electric Vehicle Market Dynamics and Strategic Analysis
highlights: Built an interactive Tableau dashboard on 150K+ records tracking EV adoption trends (2011-2024); dynamic Top N parameters revealed Tesla's 52% market dominance.
Developed a CAFV Eligibility tracking system auditing fleet compliance with environmental standards; identified a 12% non-eligibility gap in legacy hybrid models.
